failure_mode: This is a practical local PatchCore implementation rather than an official benchmark reproduction; the anomaly map is still rendered on a coarse patch grid.
intervention: Replace the top scored query patch with its nearest normal patch and recompute the local score as a didactic counterfactual probe.
key_lesson: A PatchCore-style detector can make an anomaly score inspectable by showing which nominal patches were nearest to the suspicious region.
model: PatchCore-style nearest-neighbour memory bank with feature_map_resnet18_imagenet_layer2_layer3 patch features.
remaining_caveats: Nearest-normal exemplars are retrieved from the 512-patch coreset.
Coarse overlay is not pixel-level anomaly-map interpolation.
Benchmark diagnostics use image-level max patch scores and top-patch overlap, not official pixel-level PatchCore metrics.
task: Unsupervised industrial anomaly detection on the MVTec AD bottle category.
title: Demo 03 - PatchCore on MVTec AD bottle
